falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 rises by 5% or more in 7 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp upward move would contradict the 'HOLD' signal and suggest a trend reversal, invalidating the unknown verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume on the Nasdaq exceeds 200% of the 30-day average volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff volume spike would indicate extreme market stress, directly contradicting the current 'HOLD' signal and low blowoff score.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 20-day moving average of the VIX crosses below 15
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained drop in volatility would invalidate the pattern's similarity to the 2024 bottom, which typically precedes increased volatility.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
